summary: Comprehensive testing of Aquarium Simulator (Next.js 16 + Phaser 4 + Zustand 5). Backend (FastAPI) and frontend (Phaser canvas, Zustand store, interactions) all working. 5/5 backend tests pass, 12/12 frontend flows pass.

issues: WebGL warning: 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' fires a few times on canvas mount. Non-blocking but worth investigating in MainScene.ts (likely from texture sampling/readback). Does not affect gameplay.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend is intentionally minimal (health + sprite endpoints) per architecture; no concerns.
All 22 required sprites are present in /app/frontend/public/sprites/.

Phaser canvas renders correctly at 1522x944 with full visual fidelity: tank background, light beams, substrate, rocks, driftwood, rooted plants, swimming fish (guppies/neon tetras/corydoras), LED light, heater, filter, bubbles.
Zustand persist works correctly: reset-tank-button restored fish=7 and cash=$250 after purchases.
Optional: Consider suppressing or addressing the 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' WebGL warning in Phaser scene (texture readback pattern). Cosmetic only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has only /api/health and /api/sprites (and /api/sprites/generate POST that uses Emergent LLM). Frontend uses Next.js 16 client-side with Zustand persist (localStorage). Phaser canvas takes ~3s to mount. confirm() is used in reset; auto-accept dialogs. All interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Equipment items have dynamic IDs like 'toggle-filter-eq_xxxx' and 'power-eq_xxxx' (prefix match works).

tests_verified.landing_page: PASS - enter-tank-button visible and navigates to /game
tests_verified.phaser_canvas: PASS - canvas rendered at 1522x944 inside phaser-canvas-host inside tank-container
tests_verified.topbar_kpis: PASS - shows CASH $250, FISH 7, PLANTS 5, ALERTS 0, TICK incrementing
tests_verified.stats_panel: PASS - shows TEMP, PH, NH3, NO2, NO3, O2, CO2, HARDNESS, TURBIDITY, CLEANLINESS; equipment all ON with power sliders
tests_verified.pause_resume: PASS - tick stopped at 44 when paused, resumed to 55
tests_verified.reset_tank: PASS - confirm auto-accepted, restored fish=7, cash=250
